query_used:
SELECT * FROM abstract_compositions
ORDER BY chain_count DESC
LIMIT 20

rows.description: Compose toward closure, closure fails due to structural impossibility, forced to allocate damage
rows.structural_pattern: Meta-theorem detector: every impossibility result generates a family. Pythagorean comma, calendar incommensurability, crystallographic restriction, Arrow, Godel. Damage-allocation taxonomy is itself structural.

rows.description: Theorema Egregium: no isometric embedding of a sphere onto a plane. Must sacrifice area, angle, or distance.
rows.structural_pattern: Every map projection allocates geometric distortion differently. Same structure as tuning systems.

rows.description: 12 perfect fifths (3/2)^12 != 7 octaves 2^7. Fundamental theorem of arithmetic: no power of 2 equals power of 3.
rows.structural_pattern: Every tuning system allocates the Pythagorean comma differently. The taxonomy of damage strategies IS music theory.

rows.description: No rank-order electoral system satisfies Non-Dictatorship + Unrestricted Domain + Pareto + IIA simultaneously.
rows.structural_pattern: Condorcet cycles create non-transitive group preference from transitive individual preferences.

rows.description: A distributed system cannot simultaneously guarantee Consistency, Availability, and Partition tolerance.
rows.structural_pattern: Every distributed database sacrifices one of C, A, or P. The taxonomy of which property is sacrificed IS distributed systems theory.

rows.description: No general algebraic solution using radicals for polynomials of degree 5+. S_n not solvable for n>=5 (A_5 is simple non-abelian).
rows.structural_pattern: Abel-Ruffini/Galois. Damage strategies: PARTITION domain (Galois classification), EXTEND operations (Bring radicals), TRUNCATE to approximation (Newton-Raphson), HIERARCHIZE to transcendentals (elliptic functions), RANDOMIZE search (Monte Carlo).

rows.description: Cannot transmit information faster than channel capacity C = B log2(1 + SNR).
rows.structural_pattern: Noise fundamentally limits information transmission rate.

rows.description: It is impossible to create an identical copy of an arbitrary, unknown quantum state.
rows.structural_pattern: Quantum mechanics requires all operations to be unitary (linear). The cloning transformation $|\psi\rangle \to |\psi\rangle \otimes |\psi\rangle$ is inherently non-linear.

rows.primitive_sequence: COMPOSE(rates, capital, policy) → COMPLETE(equilibrium) FAILS → BREAK_SYMMETRY(abandon_one_vertex)
rows.description: A national economy cannot simultaneously maintain a fixed foreign exchange rate, free capital movement, and an independent monetary policy.
rows.structural_pattern: If a central bank sets an interest rate different from the global rate while capital is free to move, arbitrageurs will flood money in or out, forcing the central bank to print or burn reserves to maintain the fixed exchange rate, rapidly exhausting those reserves and breaking the peg.

rows.description: Fourier series cannot converge to discontinuous function without permanent ~9% overshoot at jumps. L2 converges but L-infinity does not.
rows.structural_pattern: Gibbs 1899. Damage strategies: CONCENTRATE ringing at discontinuity, DISTRIBUTE via Cesaro averaging, TRUNCATE via Lanczos windowing, HIERARCHIZE via wavelets, PARTITION via Chebyshev nodes.

rows.description: No bilateral trading mechanism can be simultaneously efficient, budget-balanced, and individually rational under private overlapping valuations.
rows.structural_pattern: Information asymmetry makes truth-telling require information rents that break budget balance.

rows.description: Integral of log sensitivity over all frequencies = constant. Cannot suppress disturbances at all frequencies. Cauchy integral theorem enforces conservation.
rows.structural_pattern: THE validation case for damage algebra. Damage conservation is a THEOREM here, not a metaphor. 5 of 7 damage operators instantiated in one engineering domain.

rows.primitive_sequence: COMPOSE(program + input) → COMPLETE(decision procedure) FAILS → BREAK_SYMMETRY(damage allocation in computation limits)
rows.description: No algorithm can decide, for all Turing machines and inputs, whether the machine halts
rows.structural_pattern: COMPOSE(program + input) → COMPLETE(decision procedure) FAILS → BREAK_SYMMETRY(damage allocation in computation limits)

rows.primitive_sequence: COMPOSE(preferences) → COMPLETE(strategy-proof aggregation) FAILS → BREAK_SYMMETRY(damage allocation in voting rule)
rows.description: No non-dictatorial voting rule with three or more outcomes is strategy-proof for all preference profiles
rows.structural_pattern: COMPOSE(preferences) → COMPLETE(strategy-proof aggregation) FAILS → BREAK_SYMMETRY(damage allocation in voting rule)

rows.description: Decompose into binary components, compose selectively, reduce to result
rows.structural_pattern: Universal binary decomposition-recomposition motif for computing products via doubling and selection

rows.description: Solar year (365.2422 days) is not an integer multiple of lunar month (29.5306 days). Ratio is irrational.
rows.structural_pattern: Every calendar allocates the remainder differently. Aboriginal seasonal calendar dissolves the impossibility by making time elastic.

rows.description: Cannot reconstruct a signal from samples taken at less than twice its highest frequency.
rows.structural_pattern: Shannon-Nyquist sampling theorem. Aliasing below Nyquist rate.

rows.description: No consistent formal system containing arithmetic can prove its own consistency or be complete.
rows.structural_pattern: Self-reference via Godel numbering creates undecidable sentences.

rows.description: No voting system satisfies all fairness axioms (Arrow 1951)
rows.structural_pattern: Which axiom each system sacrifices IS social choice theory.

rows.description: In human motor and decision tasks, response speed and movement accuracy cannot be simultaneously maximized; reducing the time taken to hit a target or make a choice fundamentally increases the error rate.
rows.structural_pattern: The human nervous system acts as a noisy Shannon communication channel. Transmitting motor-control information requires time proportional to the required precision (target width). Pushing information faster than channel capacity guarantees signal corruption (error).
